scripts.build:mcp-client: pnpm --filter @ic402/client build && pnpm --filter @ic402/mcp build && pnpm --filter @ic402/mcp-client build
scripts.predemo: [ -f .env.development ] && . .env.development; EXAMPLE_ID=$(icp canister status example -e local --id-only 2>/dev/null); icp identity export test-payer > /tmp/ic402-test-payer.pem 2>/dev/null; icp canister call $EXAMPLE_ID closeExpiredSessions '()' -e local >/dev/null 2>&1; icp canister call ckusdc_ledger icrc1_transfer "(record { to = record { owner = principal \"bjqoy-pqyjc-56hrv-i7iz3-ikzte-wuzmd-iyzzr-uxnvt-nibgn-cl3jc-aqe\"; subaccount = null }; amount = 1_000_000 : nat; fee = null; memo = null; from_subaccount = null; created_at_time = null })" -e local >/dev/null 2>&1; icp canister call ckusdc_ledger icrc2_approve "(record { spender = record { owner = principal \"$EXAMPLE_ID\"; subaccount = null }; amount = 1_000_000 : nat; fee = null; memo = null; from_subaccount = null; created_at_time = null; expected_allowance = null; expires_at = null })" -e local --identity test-payer >/dev/null 2>&1
scripts.demo: pnpm predemo; [ -f .env.development ] && . .env.development; export ICP_IDENTITY_PEM=/tmp/ic402-test-payer.pem; node integration/mcp-client/dist/index.js --env local
scripts.demo:prod: [ -f deploy/.env.production ] && . deploy/.env.production; icp identity export ${DEMO_IDENTITY:-ic402-demo} > /tmp/ic402-demo.pem 2>/dev/null; export ICP_IDENTITY_PEM=/tmp/ic402-demo.pem; node integration/mcp-client/dist/index.js --env ic
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/client/node_modules packages/client/dist integration/mcp/node_modules integration/mcp/dist .pnpm-store .mops .icp/cache *.wasm
